title: Texas US Senate race heats up as Talarico leads Cornyn, Paxton in poll
shortDescription: A new poll shows Democratic candidate James Talarico slightly ahead of Republican primary runoff candidates Ken Paxton and John Cornyn.

title: For the third time in 2 years, a gunman got alarmingly close to Trump | The Excerpt
shortDescription: USA TODAY’s Susan Page describes the chaos at this year’s annual dinner. She also shares what it was like for her when she planned the dinner.

title: King Charles' US visit continues with Trump meeting
shortDescription: King Charles III and Queen Camilla are currently making their first state visit to the U.S. See their full schedule.

title: Trump weighs peace offer, says Iran wants Strait of Hormuz reopened
shortDescription: The White House confirmed Trump received an offer without saying whether the president appeared to approve of the Islamic republic’s terms.

title: Trump is not popular in the UK. MAGA-esque politics are.
shortDescription: The UK's far-right movement is 'similar but different' to MAGA, one expert says.

title: Florida redistricting plan could backfire on Republicans. Here's how
shortDescription: President Trump's push for Republican leaders in red states to redraw congressional boundaries now pivots to Florida and Gov. Ron DeSantis.

title: King Charles set for rare address to Congress as royal visit ramps up
shortDescription: King Charles III will be speaking to members of the House and Senate amid heightened geopolitical tensions between the United States and his country.

title: Trump and King Charles to meet behind closed doors in Oval Office
shortDescription: Trump is scheduled to sit down with His Majesty as part of a flurry of activities the White House has planned during the state visit.

title: A MAHA mutiny could reshape the farm bill – and the midterm elections
shortDescription: The "Make America Healthy Again" movement galvanized moms behind the Trump administration. Now they're at odds with the Republican Party.

title: Trump endorses changing ICE's name to NICE in late night post
shortDescription: President Donald Trump endorsed the idea of changing the name of ICE to NICE as the agency faces deep criticism.

title: Trumps greet King Charles, Queen Camilla
shortDescription: King Charles and Queen Camilla were greeted by President Trump and First Lady Melania as they kicked off their state visit to the U.S.

title: Shots fired, then wine grabbed at White House Correspondents' Association dinner
shortDescription: A viral video shows a woman calmly picking up wine bottles during the White House Correspondents' Association dinner evacuation.

title: White House dinner shooting suspect appears in court
shortDescription: A judge announced Cole Tomas Allen is being charged with attempting to assassinate the president of the United States.

title: Supreme Court upholds Texas redrawn congressional map, democrats react
shortDescription: The Supreme Court approved Texas's redrawn congressional map, sparking outrage from Democrats who call it 'racist.'
